text:
Star Wars: The Bad Batch Side by Side | “Riot Racing” Behind the Scenes | Animatic vs. Episode
Tech uses strategic thinking to outwit the undefeated riot race pilot Jet Venim. Check out the original animatic alongside the final imagery of the riot racing scene from Season 2 Episode 4 of Star Wars: The Bad Batch (“Faster”).

Star Wars: The Bad Batch is now only streaming on  @disneyplus
